description_long: This is a modern, single-bit axe with a sleek, black metal head and a gently curved handle. The blade is broad and slightly flared, with a sharp cutting edge and a pronounced beard, allowing for controlled chopping and splitting. The handle appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or wood material, ergonomically shaped with a gentle curve for a comfortable grip. Several rivets or fasteners are visible along the handle, suggesting a secure attachment to the blade. The axe has a minimalist, utilitarian design with no visible decorative markings or branding. Its compact size and robust construction make it suitable for urban tasks such as chopping wood, clearing brush, or emergency use.
description: A modern, black-bladed axe with a curved, riveted handle and a broad, sharp cutting edge. The design is sleek and utilitarian, ideal for urban tool use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved handle, broad blade, and visible rivets.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same curved handle and blade profile visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the thin profile of the axe.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle made of dark wood or composite, with a smooth finish and visible rivets; oval cross-section for secure grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single-bit, broad blade with a sharp edge and pronounced beard; flat poll and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, riveted or fastened mounting with visible metal fasteners securing the blade to the handle.
